name: Local Memory
description: Context Engineering system that cures AI context amnesia by transforming developer expertise into permanent AI intelligence. Build once, leverage forever across all agents.
core_value: Your context is your competitive advantage - keep it local, private, and valuable
key_features: Context Engineering - transform expertise into AI intelligence
23 MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools in 8 categories
51 REST API endpoints for universal integration
Four-level Knowledge Architecture (L0-L3) with level_label in every response
Cures context amnesia across all AI agents
100% local storage - no cloud training exposure
Cross-agent memory persistence with session isolation

knowledge_intake: observe - Record observations for knowledge processing (L0); returns structured JSON with memory_id, level_label, importance, tags, summary, suggested_actions
question - Track epistemic gaps, contradictions, and prediction failures
bootstrap - Initialize session with knowledge context and pending questions
core_memory: search - Multi-mode search (semantic, tags, date_range, hybrid) with level_label and level distribution
update_memory - Modify existing memory content and metadata
delete_memory - Remove memories with relationship cleanup
knowledge_evolution: reflect - Process observations into learnings (L0→L1); idempotent via promotion links; dry_run=true previews without modifying data
evolve - Validate, promote, or decay knowledge
resolve - Handle contradictions and answer questions
reasoning: predict - Generate predictions from patterns and schemas (session-scoped)
explain - Trace causal paths between states (session-scoped)
ask - Answer a question using stored memories as context
summarize - Summarize stored memories for a given timeframe
relationships: relate - Create typed relationships between memories
find_related - Find connected memories via graph traversal and vector similarity
discover - Find latent relationships across stored memories without needing IDs
map_graph - Traverse the explicit relationship graph around a memory
temporal_analysis: temporal - Analyze knowledge evolution over time; operations: patterns, progression, gaps, timeline
graph_status: validate - Check knowledge graph integrity; requires confirm_auto_fix=true for destructive operations
status - Unified system status with level_distribution (observation/learning/pattern/schema counts)
management: migrate_domain - Batch-rename all memories from one domain to another; supports dry_run

knowledge_architecture.description: Four-level knowledge hierarchy from raw observations to theoretical frameworks. Every response includes level_label using canonical vocabulary.

rest_api.discovery: GET /api/v1/ returns a dynamically generated catalogue of all 51 endpoints with deprecated and replaced_by metadata
rest_api.note: Unknown paths return 404. observe endpoint returns flat JSON (no success/data envelope). Reflect and evolve return {operation, result, summary, suggested_actions}.

breaking_changes_v150.store_memory_removed: store_memory MCP tool removed; use observe instead (returns -32601 Method Not Found)
breaking_changes_v150.remember_cli_removed: CLI remember command removed; use observe instead
breaking_changes_v150.observe_response: MCP observe and question now return structured JSON, not plain strings
breaking_changes_v150.rest_observe_response: POST /api/v1/observe returns flat object (no {success, data, message} envelope)
breaking_changes_v150.reflect_evolve_response: reflect and evolve responses wrapped: {operation, result, summary, suggested_actions}
breaking_changes_v150.validate_confirmation: validate(auto_fix=true, dry_run=false) requires confirm_auto_fix=true or X-Confirm-Auto-Fix header
breaking_changes_v150.level_field_type: memory level field is now integer (0-3); use level_name for the string label
breaking_changes_v150.status_fields: pending_questions replaced by epistemic_gaps and contradictions

use_cases: Building AI intelligence assets from expertise
Preventing context amnesia in coding agents
Creating competitive advantage through AI memory
Temporal knowledge analysis and progression tracking

value_propositions.time_savings: Save 2+ hours daily eliminating repeated explanations
value_propositions.asset_value: Transform $100K+ of expertise into AI intelligence
value_propositions.competitive_advantage: Keep your context private vs cloud training
value_propositions.efficiency: Build once, leverage forever across all agents

protocols: MCP (Model Context Protocol) - Native Integration (23 tools)
technical_specs.dependencies: Zero - actually zero, not 'zero*' with footnotes
technical_specs.token_optimization: Up to 97.5% response size reduction with format controls

context_engineering.definition: The practice of transforming human expertise into persistent AI memory
context_engineering.process: Every explanation becomes a permanent asset that compounds over time
context_engineering.outcome: AI intelligence that grows with your expertise

target_audience: AI power users with context amnesia problems
Development teams using multiple AI agents

documentation.integration_examples: Claude, OpenCode, Gemini, Cursor, Windsurf setup guides

competitive_advantages: Only system offering Context Engineering capabilities
100% local - no cloud training data exposure
Native MCP + universal REST dual protocol
Cross-agent memory persistence with session isolation
Knowledge levels visible in every response

data_sovereignty.privacy: Your context never leaves your control
data_sovereignty.training: Never used for AI model training

search_keywords: L0 L1 L2 L3 knowledge levels
testimonial: Local memory MCP has really helped boost my productivity. But more importantly, I'm no longer just using AI—I'm engineering my expertise into it. Every day my AI gets smarter about MY specific project context.
